examTitle: Work & Career: A2 Mock Speaking Exam

parts.title: Part 1: Examiner Interview - Personal Questions
parts.instructions: The examiner will ask you questions about your personal life, hobbies, and background. Please answer as clearly and concisely as possible.
parts.content: Examiner: Hi, let's start with some basic questions about you. Can you tell me a little bit about yourself?

questions.question: Interview Questions
questions.tips: A strategy guide. Answer the questions as clearly and concisely as possible. Use the present simple tense to describe your daily routines and hobbies.

part1Questions.question: What's your name and how old are you?
part1Questions.answer: My name is John and I'm 25 years old.
part1Questions.tips: Use the present simple tense to describe your age. Use your full name, first name and surname.

part1Questions.question: Where do you live and what do you like about your home?
part1Questions.answer: I live in a small apartment in the city center. I like it because it's close to my work and I have a view of the park.
part1Questions.tips: Use the present simple tense to describe your home. Describe two or three things you like about your home.

part1Questions.question: What do you like to do in your free time?
part1Questions.answer: I like to play football with my friends and watch movies.
part1Questions.tips: Use the present simple tense to describe your hobbies. Name two or three things you like to do in your free time.

part1Questions.question: What's your favorite subject in school and why?
part1Questions.answer: My favorite subject is English because I like to read and write.
part1Questions.tips: Use the present simple tense to describe your favorite subject. Explain why you like it.

part1Questions.question: Do you have any pets and what kind of pets do you have?
part1Questions.answer: Yes, I have a cat named Max. He's a black cat and he's very playful.
part1Questions.tips: Use the present simple tense to describe your pets. Name your pet and describe its characteristics.

part1Questions.question: What are your plans for the future?
part1Questions.answer: I want to go to university and study business.
part1Questions.tips: Use the present simple tense to describe your plans. Name the university you want to attend and the course you want to study.

parts.title: Part 2: Collaborative Task - Talking about a Job
parts.instructions: You will talk to your partner about a job. Please discuss the following topic: 'A job that interests you'.

content.question: A job that interests you
imagePrompts: An image of a person working as a chef in a busy restaurant.
An image of a person working as a teacher in a classroom.
possibleAnswers: I'm interested in working as a chef because I like cooking and trying new foods.
I think being a teacher would be great because I enjoy helping people learn.
I'm interested in working as a scientist because I like solving puzzles and discovering new things.
